title: AL's 3D Totem
description: A pack that makes the Totem of Undying 3D!
body:
![AL's 3D Totem logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4059b861e663acc27605e7e8407d224b008e5954.png)

# 

This custom item pack gives the Totem of Undying a 3D model!

The design of the 3D model is a faithful port of the Minecraft Dungeons Totem model for when you respawn in that game but given a fresh new texture!

A cool feature I included is that, when in the inventory or dropped onto the ground as an item, it keeps it's original 2D sprite!

 

This pack can work in completely vanilla Minecraft which means OptiFine is NOT required.
